highlights: AI agents are evolving rapidly with new frameworks for self-optimization and significant gains in enterprise efficiency through better orchestration, reducing costs and increasing task completion.

Major model advancements include OpenAI's full-duplex voice models for natural interaction and NVIDIA's compressed MoE LLM delivering over 2x throughput, alongside new open-source models for robotics and vision.
Developer tools are simplifying AI application deployment and management, with Google AI Studio integrating GitHub import and enhanced Gemini API capabilities for production-ready agent building.

agents.title: SpaceXAI Releases Grok 4.5 for Coding and Agentic Tasks
agents.summary: SpaceXAI has released Grok 4.5, a Cursor-trained model optimized for coding, agentic tasks, and knowledge work, offering competitive pricing at $2 per million input tokens and ranking #1 on legal agent benchmarks.

agents.title: Iterative Tool Optimization for Self-Evolving LLM Agents (EvoSOP)
agents.summary: A new framework, EvoSOP, enables LLM agents to self-evolve by synthesizing atomic actions into reusable Standard Operating Procedures, significantly boosting task success rates and reducing interaction rounds.

agents.title: The Harness Effect: Optimizing Token Economics in Enterprise Agentic AI
agents.summary: Research demonstrates that the orchestration layer (harness) in enterprise agentic AI is crucial for efficiency, reducing blended cost per task by 41% and tokens per task by 38% while maintaining quality across various models.

models.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-Live and GPT-Live-1 mini: Full-Duplex Voice Models
models.summary: OpenAI has introduced GPT-Live, a new generation of full-duplex voice models now powering ChatGPT Voice, enabling simultaneous listening and speaking with deeper reasoning delegated to GPT-5.5 for more natural human-AI interaction.

models.title: NVIDIA Releases Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B: Compressed Hybrid MoE LLM
models.summary: NVIDIA's new Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B is a compressed hybrid MoE LLM that delivers 2.03x server throughput at matched user throughput, significantly improving efficiency for large-scale language model inference.

models.title: Robbyant Releases LingBot-VLA 2.0: Open-Source 6B Vision-Language-Action Model
models.summary: Ant Group's Robbyant has open-sourced LingBot-VLA 2.0, a 6B vision-language-action model for cross-embodiment robot manipulation, trained on extensive robot trajectory and human video data for versatile control.

tools.title: Google AI Studio Adds Import from GitHub for Deployable Apps
tools.summary: Google AI Studio now allows direct import from GitHub in Build mode, transforming existing repositories into runtime-compatible formats for easier iteration and deployment of AI applications.

tools.title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API for Developers
tools.summary: Google is enhancing Managed Agents in the Gemini API with new capabilities, including background tasks and remote Multi-Agent Coordination Protocol (MCP), to help developers build reliable, production-ready AI agents.

tools.title: One-Click Deployment from Hugging Face to Amazon SageMaker Studio
tools.summary: Hugging Face now offers a one-click integration to deploy models directly to Amazon SageMaker Studio, streamlining MLOps workflows and making it easier for developers to manage and scale their AI models.

companies.title: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil LLM-Optimized Inference Chip
companies.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom have introduced Jalapeño, a custom AI chip designed for LLM inference, aiming to significantly improve performance, efficiency, and scalability across AI systems.

companies.title: OpenAI Outlines Approach to Government and National Security Partnerships
companies.summary: OpenAI has published its principles for engaging with government and national security sectors, emphasizing responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety in strategic collaborations.

companies.title: HP Inc. Scales Frontier Strategic Partnership with OpenAI
companies.summary: HP Inc. is expanding its OpenAI Frontier partnership to integrate AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations, aiming to deploy advanced AI capabilities at scale.

learning.title: NVIDIA’s Cosmos-Framework Tutorial: Building Miniature World Models in Colab
learning.summary: NVIDIA released a tutorial for their cosmos-framework, guiding developers through designing and training a Colab-friendly miniature of Cosmos 3 World Models using an omnimodal Mixture-of-Transformers for future latent state prediction.

learning.title: OpenAI Academy Helps K–12 Educators Build Practical AI Skills
learning.summary: OpenAI Academy, in partnership with the Walton Family Foundation, is launching 'AI Skills Jams' to provide K–12 educators with hands-on training to build practical AI skills for classroom integration.

learning.title: NYC AI Summit: Google and Leaders Shape AI's Future in Classrooms
learning.summary: Google, alongside the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly, hosted an AI summit in NYC for 150 education and industry leaders to discuss and shape the future integration of AI in K–12 classrooms.
